segments.speaker: 题目21/22
segments.text: Listen to an announcement in a classroom class. The textbooks for our course are on back order, and the bookstore isn't sure when they will be in. That said, I've identified an alternative open education resource. This means that there will be no cost for you, but the book will only be available online. Supplemental materials will be photocopied and distributed in class. And I'll also want your feedback at the end of the semester to determine whether the new book works as a feasible permanent replacement.
